Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 286 

TRNSPRTN_PAHP_MOS 

LABEL: Transportation Prepaid Ambulatory Health Plan (PAHP) Months 

DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a Transportation Prepaid Ambulatory Health Plan 
(PAHP) Managed Care Plan in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: TRNSPRTN_PAHP_MOS 

LONG NAME: TRNSPRTN_PAHP_MOS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): Managed Care
